activeAbilities.name: Natural Order
activeAbilities.description: All models within the pulse suffer 1 WD for each energy token they have over 3

activeAbilities.name: Reload [Blunderbuss]
activeAbilities.description: The named ability can be used again. This ability cannot be used while the model is engaged.

activeAbilities.name: Hunting Party
activeAbilities.description: Target enemy that has activated this turn must discard half of its remaining energy rounded up. Then friendly Humas and Fauns gain +1 Arcane and +2 Melee Stat when targetting that enemy with actions until end of turn.

arcaneAbilities.name: Blunderbuss
arcaneAbilities.description:
Target suffers X Impact DMG.
Catastrophe: This model suffers 2 Wds.

signatureMove.name: Spin-Kick
signatureMove.endStepEffect: Move the enemy model 1". You may immediately play the Reload ability even if engaged, and without spending energy.
